title: Gaucher disease in African patients: a review of the literature and case series
purpose: Source for Gaucher Disease presentation in East Africa and diagnostic delay

title: Adult-onset Still disease: diagnostic delay and misdiagnosis as TB in Central Africa
purpose: AOSD diagnostic criteria and delay data; hyperferritinemia pattern in Africa

title: Autoimmune hepatitis in South Africa: a retrospective analysis of 178 patients
purpose: AIH in sub-Saharan Africa — 50% cirrhosis at diagnosis indicating multi-year delay

title: Endemic Kaposi sarcoma in HIV-negative patients in the DRC: a case series
purpose: HIV-negative endemic KS in Central Africa; HHV-8 prevalence and diagnostic delay

title: Mycetoma in the Horn of Africa: epidemiology, diagnosis and management challenges
purpose: Mycetoma delay data for Somalia/Sudan; median 3-year delay, up to 36 years

title: Cutaneous tuberculosis mimicking mycetoma in the mycetoma belt of Sudan
purpose: Cutaneous TB misdiagnosed as Madura foot in Kassala, Sudan — reverse mimicry

title: Subcutaneous basidiobolomycosis in West Africa: case series and review
purpose: Basidiobolomycosis misdiagnosed as Buruli ulcer in Benin; Splendore-Hoeppli phenomenon

title: Familial Mediterranean fever: first case report in Somalia and review of cases in Africa
purpose: FMF diagnostic delay outside Mediterranean — 8-15 years in non-endemic populations

title: Konzo: a neurological disease associated with cyanide intoxication from cassava in DRC
purpose: Konzo epidemiology in Kwango DRC; spastic vs flaccid paralysis differentiation

title: Podoconiosis: neglected tropical disease with high burden in Ethiopian highlands
purpose: Podoconiosis vs LF differentiation; altitude and soil type as diagnostic discriminators

title: Rhodesiense sleeping sickness in travellers: systematic review and clinical outcomes
purpose: rHAT in safari tourists; rapid CNS progression vs Rickettsia africae

title: Leprosy masquerading as systemic lupus erythematosus: diagnostic pitfalls in Africa
purpose: Leprosy-SLE misdiagnosis; ANA cross-reactivity in multibacillary leprosy

title: Female genital schistosomiasis: a forgotten cause of morbidity in sub-Saharan Africa
purpose: FGS epidemiology — 56 million affected, ~15,000 ever formally diagnosed

title: Wilson disease in Africa: a systematic review and meta-analysis
purpose: Wilson's Disease in Africa — ~15 documented cases continent-wide; up to 12-year delay

title: Neuro-Behcet disease in Tunisia: clinical features, diagnosis and outcome
purpose: Neuro-Behcet CVT in North Africa; 53.5 month mean diagnostic delay in Tunisian cohort

title: Kenya GBS epidemiology study — 207 patients, Kenyatta National Hospital
purpose: Kenya GBS data used in manus.py investigation prompt for Guillain-Barré context
